101.bio: Maria has been serving Precinct 101 for over 10 years, advocating for better schools and voter turnout. She believes in grassroots organizing and building a stronger community together.
101.announcement: Join us this Saturday for our monthly precinct block walk! Meet at the local park at 9 AM. Bring water and walking shoes.

102.bio: James is a retired teacher who is passionate about getting out the vote and registering new voters in our area. He loves helping people understand the ballot.
102.announcement: Next week's precinct meeting is moved to the community center due to renovations at our usual spot.

103.bio: Elena focuses on youth engagement and community outreach within Precinct 103. She is a powerhouse when it comes to organizing local events.
103.announcement: Looking for 5 more volunteers for our upcoming voter registration drive at the high school. Please email me if you can help!
